enum.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_TYPE
enum.description: List of available GNSS-Systems with numbering accoring to UBLOX

entry.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_GPS
entry.description: GNSS Sytem Type: Global Positioning System (GPS)

entry.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_SBAS
entry.description: GNSS Sytem Type: Satellite-based Augmentation System (SBAS)

entry.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_GAL
entry.description: GNSS Sytem Type: European Union Global Navigation Satellite System GALILEO

entry.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_CMP
entry.description: GNSS Sytem Type: Chinese BeiDou Navigation Satellite System (CMP)

entry.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_QZS
entry.description: GNSS Sytem Type: Quasi-Zenith Satellite System (QZSS)

entry.name: UBLOX_GNSS_SYSTEM_GLO
entry.description: GNSS Sytem Type: Russian Federation Global Navigation Satellite System GLONASS

enum.name: GNSS_MSG_DATA_TYPE
enum.description: List of GNSS message data types to be requested.

entry.name: GNSS_PSEUDORANGE_PHASESHIFT
entry.description: Request Pseudorange and Phaseshift data of available satellites.

entry.name: GNSS_EPHEMERIS
entry.description: Request Ehemeris data of available satellites.

enum.name: WEA_MOTION_MODE
enum.description: List of motion conditions of a wind turbine.

entry.name: WEA_STOPPING
entry.description: WEA turbine is decreasing rpm in order to stop.

entry.name: WEA_STARTING_UP
entry.description: WEA is increasing rpm to enter normal operation.

entry.name: WEA_NOT_AVAILABLE
entry.description: Data about the current WEA motion mode is n/a.

entry.name: WEA_HOIST_READY
entry.description: WEA is ready for hoisting/landing maneuver.

enum.name: CTRL_IT_FLAGS
enum.description: List of controller active axes flags.

enum.name: WEPILOT_CTRL_MODE
enum.description: List of main controller modes of wePilot.

enum.name: WEPILOT_FLT_MODE
enum.description: List of flight modes of wePilot.

enum.name: WEPILOT_FLT_PHASE
enum.description: List of flight phases of wePilot.

enum.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE
enum.description: List of flight subphases of wePilot.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_GOV_RAMP
entry.description: Flight sub phase governor ramping up.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_EXTERNAL_CTRL
entry.description: Flight sub phase DLR external control mode.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_GOTO_WAYPOINT
entry.description: Flight sub phase go to waypoint.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_WAIT_LPD_GREEN
entry.description: Flight sub phase wait for landing pad to be ready.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_GOTO_HOME
entry.description: Flight sub phase go to home point.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_CIRCLE_HOME
entry.description: Flight subphase circle at home point.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_STOP_HOME
entry.description: Flight subphase stop at home point.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_GOTO_MOVING_HOME
entry.description: Flight subphase go to moving home point.

entry.name: WEPILOT_FLT_SUBPHASE_CIRCLE_MOVING_HOME
entry.description: Flight subphase circle and moving home.

enum.name: PATH_BOUND_TYPE
enum.description: Indicates whether the vehicle is flying inbound/outbound/or indifferent to reference position.

enum.name: PATH_DEVIATION_TYPE
enum.description: Indicates what type of path the deviation information in PATH_INDICATOR message is referring to.

message.name: FORCE_SENSOR_DATA
message.description: Holds 6-Axis Force Sensor Data
message.field: Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot) by checking for the magnitude of the number.
Torqe around x-Axis in Milli-Newton Millimeter
Torqe around y-Axis in Milli-Newton Millimeter
Torqe around z-Axis in Milli-Newton Millimeter

message.name: AUX_OUTPUT
message.description: Holds 8 PWM output values of AUX channel
message.field: Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot) by checking for the magnitude of the number.

message.name: CONTROLLER_STATE
message.description: Holds 8 PWM output values of AUX channel
message.field: Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot) by checking for the magnitude of the number.
Binary flags indicating, which axes are affected by the controller (in order lsb first: roll,pitch,yaw,throttle, e.g. 0b1100 refers to active yaw and throttle axes)
Normalized throttle input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized roll input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized pitch input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized yaw input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized throttle input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized roll input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized pitch input value in range [-1,1]
Normalized yaw input value in range [-1,1]

message.name: GNSS_PSEUDO_RANGE_PHASE_SHIFT
message.description: Holds Satellite Number(SAT) and its Pseudo-Range and Phase Shift as measured by a GNSS-Antenna
message.field: Phase Shift in nanoseconds (10^-9 of a second)

message.name: GNSS_EPOCH_TIME
message.description: Holds the new epoch time of the last raw gnss measurements. Usually follows GNSS_PSEUDO_RANGE_PHASE_SHIFT messages.

message.name: GNSS_STANDARD_EPHEMERIS
message.description: Holds Satellite Number(SAT) and its ephemeris data for GPS, SBAS, GALILEO, CMP, and QZSS GNSS-Systems (GLONASS has its own ephemeris definition)
message.field: GPS/QZS: code on L2, GAL/CMP: data sources
GPS/QZS: L2 P data flag, CMP: nav type
Clock Data Reference Time of Week
Longitude of Ascending Node of Orbit Plane at Weekly Epoch
Mean Motion Difference From Computed Value
Amplitude of the Cosine Harmonic Correction Term to the Orbit Radius
Amplitude of the Sine Harmonic Correction Term to the Orbit Radius
Amplitude of the Cosine Harmonic Correction Term to the Argument of Latitude
Amplitude of the Sine Harmonic Correction Term to the Argument of Latitude
Amplitude of the Cosine Harmonic Correction Term to the Angle of Inclination
Amplitude of the Sine Harmonic Correction Term to the Angle of Inclination
Group delay parameters, GPS/QZS:tgd[0]=TGD, GAL:tgd[0]=BGD E5a/E1,tgd[1]=BGD E5b/E1, CMP:tgd[0]=BGD1,tgd[1]=BGD2
Rate of mean motiondifference from computed value

message.name: GNSS_GLNOASS_EPHEMERIS
message.description: Holds Satellite Number(SAT) and its ephemeris data for GPS, SBAS, GALILEO, CMP, and QZSS GNSS-Systems (GLONASS has its own ephemeris definition)

message.name: GNSS_CMD_REQUEST_ALL_DATA
message.description: Request all available satellite data of the type specified in datatype
message.field: GNSS-System data type to be requested.

message.name: GNSS_CMD_REQUEST_DATA_LIST
message.description: Request satellite data specified in datatype, if avialable, of n-satellites specified in Sat.
message.field: GNSS-System data type to be requested.
Amount of satellites requested in this msg
Amount of satellites requested in this msg

message.name: WEA_INFO_DATA
message.description: Transmits received information on wind energy turbines to the GCS.
message.field: Identifier of wind turbine in windpark Windpark_ID
Measured rotation of wind turbine (mrpm = 1000 * rpm)

message.name: MQTT_COMMAND_SUBSCRIBE
message.description: Send a command to a MQTT client to start a subscription to a topic specified in field "topic".
message.field: The topic name the MQTT client should subscribe to.

message.name: MQTT_COMMAND_UNSUBSCRIBE
message.description: Send a command to a MQTT client to stop a subscription to a topic specified in field "topic".
message.field: The topic name the MQTT client should unsubscribe from.

message.name: GNSS_RELATIVE_NAVIGATION
message.description: Relative Position to base station and supplementing information
message.field: Heading of the relative position vector
Accuracy of heading of the relative position vector
Accuracy of heading of the relative position vector
Boolian: GNSS valid fix (i.e within DOP and accuracy masks)
Boolian: Accuracy of heading of the relative position vector
Boolian: Carrier phase range solution with floating ambiguities
Boolian: Carrier phase range solution with fixed ambiguities
Boolian: The receiver is operating in moving base mode
Boolian: Extrapolated reference position was used to compute moving base solution this epoch
Boolian: Extrapolated reference observations were used to compute moving base solution this epoch
Boolian: The components of the relative position vector (including the high-precision parts) are normalized

message.name: NOSE_BOOM
message.description: Transmits received information of the superARTIS nose boom.
message.field: [1e4 deg] Raw measured angle of attack

message.name: FAUST_SETPOINTS
message.description: Transmits received information of the superARTIS nose boom.

message.name: INNER_LOOP_SETPOINT
message.description: Transmits received information of the superARTIS nose boom.

message.name: OUTER_LOOP_SETPOINT
message.description: Transmits received information of the superARTIS nose boom.
message.field: Position setpoint North or longitudinal in heading reference system.
Position setpoint East or lateral in heading reference system.
Velocity North or forward velocity in heading reference system.
Velocity East or lateral velocity in heading reference system.
Acceleration North or longitudinal in heading reference system.
Acceleration East or longitudinal in heading reference system.

message.name: FAUST_CTRL_MODE_STATUS
message.description: Transmits mode status information of FAUST controller
message.field: [-], This indicates if the experiment is enabled. The SP can choose manual or auto on his remote control, this mirrors this check 0: Manual mode, 1: Auto mode
[-], Indicates the fcs mode. 0: disabled, 1: SysID, 2:AFCS, 3:SysID + AFCS
[-], Indicates whether a SysID input is active or not. 0: disabled, 1: SysID active

message.name: TASK_SEQUENCE
message.description: Transmits currently planned sequence of tasks.
message.field: [-],Number of tasks in the task sequence.

message.name: OWF_MISSION_STATUS
message.description: Transmits detailed information on current OWF mission.
message.field: Identifier of target wind turbine in windpark Windpark_ID
[-], Target wea is ready for landing.
[-], OWF control room cleared approach on wea.
[-], Number of wind turbines of interest of which data is requested from.
[-], Number of wind turbines of interest of which data is available. (should be the same as n_wea_request if all works fine).

message.name: GPS_GGA_NTRIP_DATA
message.description: NMEA GGA message for creating an NTRIP server request for online provided RTCM corrections (requires internet)
message.field: LSB: 1 means message is fragmented, next 2 bits are the fragment ID, the remaining 5 bits are used for the sequence ID. Messages are only to be flushed to the NTRIP server when the entire message has been reconstructed. The fragment ID specifies which order the fragments should be assembled into a buffer, while the sequence ID is used to detect a mismatch between different buffers. The buffer is considered fully reconstructed when either all 4 fragments are present, or all the fragments before the first fragment with a non full payload is received. This management is used to ensure that normal GPS operation doesn't corrupt NMEA GGA data, and to recover from a unreliable transport delivery order.

message.name: LANDING_GEOMETRY
message.description: Provides information on geometry of and around landing pad.
message.field: Clearance of landing pad in forward longitudinal direction. If installed on vehicle: Length of vehicle from CoP to most forward point.
Clearance of landing pad in aft longitudinal direction. If installed on vehicle: Length of vehicle from CoP to most aft point.
Clearance of landing pad in lateral left direction. If installed on vehicle: Width of vehicle from CoP to most leftward point.
Clearance of landing pad in lateral right direction. If installed on vehicle: Width of vehicle from CoP to most rightward point.
Height of landing pad relative to surroundings. If installed on vehicle: Height of vehicle from CoP to highest point.
Zero for landing pad installed on the ground. If installed on vehicle: Height of vehicle from CoP to lowest point.
D-Value of landing pad if present. Set to 0 if not present.
Length of landing pad in longitudinal direction.
Width of landing pad in lateral direction.
Longitudinal offset of position reference point (e.g. GNSS Antenna) to CoP.
Lateral offset of position reference point (e.g. GNSS Antenna) to CoP.
Height offset (down is positive) of position reference point (e.g. GNSS Antenna) to CoP.
Orientation of longitudinal axis of landing pad with respect to true north. If installed on vehicle: Offset of longitudinal axis to vehicle's long. axis.

message.name: RELATIVE_NAVIGATION
message.description: Relative position and attitude information from CoG of vehicle to a point of interest (e.g. specified by LANDING_GEOMETRY msg).
message.field: Relative north position in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative east position in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative down position in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative north velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative east velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative down velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative north acceleration in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative east acceleration in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative down acceleration in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative north position variance in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative east position variance in NED earth-fixed frame.
Relative down position variance in NED earth-fixed frame.
Angle between vehicle x,y-plane and coop x,y-plane to indicate attitude alignment.
Roll angle between vehicle x,y-plane and coop x,y-plane.
Pitch angle between vehicle x,y-plane and coop x,y-plane.
Difference between the headings of vehicle and landing platform.
Boolean indicating whether the fields contain valid information (valid: 1, invalid: 0). Default is 0 (invalid).

message.name: LOG_STATUS_CHECK
message.description: Check whether logging is active, which logger type is active, and how many bytes have been written to the log file.
message.field: Size of written data to logfile in kiloBytes.

message.name: WEATHER_STATION_DATA
message.description: Data of weather station containing wind information.
message.field: 10min mean value of winddirection true north.
10min mean gust value of horizontal wind.
Wind observation at least for 10min achieved, mean values are valid 10min means.
Latitude (WGS84, EGM96 ellipsoid) of weather station.
Longitude (WGS84, EGM96 ellipsoid) of weather station.

message.name: HIL_DISTANCE_SENSOR
message.description: Distance sensor message equivalent to DISTANCE_SENSOR message but for use from HIL
message.field: Minimum distance the sensor can measure.
Maximum distance the sensor can measure.
Current distance the sensor is measuring.
Direction in which the sensor is oriented.
Quaternion of the sensor orientation in vehicle body frame (w, x, y, z). Zero-rotation is along the vehicle body x-axis.
Signal quality of the sensor. Calculated with the formula for TFmini. Ranges from 0 to 10000

message.name: WEPILOT_STATUS
message.description: Status information if weControl wePilot indicating condition of state machine

message.name: WEPILOT_VEHICLESTATE
message.description: Solution of sensor fusion of the weControl wePilot.
message.field: North position in NED earth-fixed frame.
East position in NED earth-fixed frame.
Down position in NED earth-fixed frame.
North velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
East velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Down velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Body frame roll / phi angular speed
Body frame pitch / theta angular speed
Body frame yaw / psi angular speed

message.name: HIL_VEHICLE
message.description: Flight mechanical state of the simulated vehicle for reference and debugging purposes.
message.field: North position in NED earth-fixed frame.
East position in NED earth-fixed frame.
Down position in NED earth-fixed frame.
North velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
East velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Down velocity in NED earth-fixed frame.
Velocity in x-direction in body-fixed frame.
Velocity in y-direction in body-fixed frame.
Velocity in z-direction in body-fixed frame.
Body frame roll / phi angular speed
Body frame pitch / theta angular speed
Body frame yaw / psi angular speed

message.name: ENGINE_STATUS
message.description: Gernalized status message for engines used for main or secondary propulsion of the vehicle.
message.field: ID number of engine. Should be unique and consistent for the lifetime of a vehicle.
ID number of the engine power source (battery for electric, fuel tank for combustion). Should be unique and consistent for the lifetime of a vehicle.
Engine Type, 0: Unknown, 1: Electric, 2: ESC, 3: Combustion, 4: Turbine
Motor DC voltage measured. Combustion or turbine: fuel pump voltage,
Fuel flow of engine: fuel flow in Centiliter per minute (combustion or turbine), motor current in centi Amperes (electric).
Consumed power (electric in mAh) or fuel (in Centiliter) since system start or installation of battery.
Motor pwm control signal in percent.

message.name: CONTROLLER_REFERENCE
message.description: Controller reference values from command filter

message.name: HIL_SBUS2
message.description: HIL and SITL message for simulating a Futaba S.BUS2 RC protocol containing sensor information.
message.field: Number of slot fields used in this message
Slots, contains 12 fields of triplet Slot-ID, Highbyte, Lowbyte

message.name: SLUNG_LOAD_DATA
message.description: Message containing sensor information and status of slung load sensor for position and motion of a slung load connected to the vehicle.
message.field: Healthy flag, true if sensor processing works correctly and slung load is correctly detected.
Lateral load position in NED in rad.
Longitudinal load position in NED in rad.
Tether length of load in m.

message.name: ELMO_CTRL_STATUS
message.description: Message containing information on the status and configuration of the ELMO motor driver.
message.field: Rotor position of motor in counts (cts).
Rotor velocity of motor in counts per second (cts/s).
Motor controller extended error code flag.
Rotor position setpoint of motor in counts (cts).
Rotor velocity setpoint of motor in counts per second (cts/s).

message.name: DLR_WINCH_STATUS
message.description: Message containing information on the status and configuration of the winch main controller.

message.name: PATH_INDICATOR
message.description: Message for indicating path deviation to pilot.
message.field: Indicates whether the vehicle is flying inbound, outbound, or indifferent to the reference point.
Indicates what type of path the deviation is referring to.
Signed (horizontal) deviation from path (e.g. from a localizer) in percent of max. indicated deviation.
Signed (vertical) deviation from path (e.g. from a glide slope) in percent of max. indicated deviation.
